sql_array: CREATE TABLE http_listeners (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url VARCHAR(255), state INT);
SELECT id, xml_tree_doc('<root><listener><url>' || url || '</url><state>' || http_listen_host(url, 2) || '</state></listener></root>') FROM http_listeners WHERE state IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM http_listeners WHERE http_listen_host(url, 1) = 1 GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT MIN(url) AS min_url, MAX(http_listen_host(url, 2)) AS max_state FROM http_listeners;
SELECT data FROM xml_test WHERE data IS NULL OR xml_tree_doc('2') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT url, http_listen_host(url, 0) AS listener_state FROM http_listeners WHERE http_listen_host(COALESCE(url, 'http://default.com'), 2) = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT state, xml_tree_doc('<root><state>' || state || '</state></root>') FROM http_listeners WHERE state IN (SELECT DISTINCT state FROM http_listeners) ORDER BY state;
